avalancheActivity.highlights: Moist and wet avalanches are the main danger.
avalancheActivity.comment:
Tuesday: The weather will be cloudy. A mostly overcast night: Outgoing longwave radiation during the night will be severely restricted. The surface of the snowpack will only just freeze and will already be soft in the early morning.
In the afternoon as a consequence of the precipitation there will be an increase in the avalanche danger within the current danger level. The sleet will give rise as the day progresses to significant moistening of the snowpack in all aspects. Wet snow slides and avalanches are possible, even quite large ones.
This applies in particular on very steep north facing slopes below approximately 2600 m, and on very steep east, south and west facing slopes at elevated altitudes.
In the regions exposed to heavier precipitation the likelihood of moist and wet avalanches will increase during the day.

snowpackStructure.comment:
Above approximately 2300 m snow will fall on Tuesday over a wide area.
In the last few days the weather was mild. This situation gave rise to increasing moistening of the snowpack below approximately 2700 m.
As a consequence of highly fluctuating temperatures the snowpack consolidated. This applies in particular on steep sunny slopes at high altitude, and in all aspects at intermediate altitudes. The snowpack is fairly homogeneous and its surface has a strong crust.
Hardly any more avalanches were reported.
The amount of snow is subject to significant local variations.
Especially on sunny slopes below the tree line no snow is lying. On shady slopes below the tree line hardly any snow is lying.
Especially on the colder slopes above the treeline, in the valley basins and headlands that have been less affected by stormy winds in recent weeks, there is excellent snow cover.
Weak layers exist in the bottom section of the snowpack in particular at high altitudes and in high Alpine regions.

tendency.highlights: Wednesday: The weather will be cloudy. Outgoing longwave radiation during the night will be reduced. The surface of the snowpack will cool hardly at all during the overcast night.

regions.name: B - VALLI DI GRESSONEY, AYAS, CHAMPORCHER
